'''Pilester Binalie''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the father of [[Corf Binalie]], a friend of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jafer Torles]], and the owner of [[Spaarti Creations]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="HOC" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he resided in a mansion near [[Foulahn City]] and attempted to remain neutral throughout the war. However, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] planned to use the factory for equipment and special purposes throughout the war. This led to a [[Attack on Cartao|fierce battle]] when Jafer and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] arrived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Pilester and his son observed as a Republic ship destroyed the factory, blaming the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] and thus ending their friendship with Torles. In secret, however, it was all a fabrication by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]].<ref name="HOC" />
